title: 64 PCS Novelty Pencil and Rubber Set,32 Cute Rubbers Erasers for Kids & 32 Triangle Pencils for Kids,Fun Stationery Set Makes a Great for School Class (Triangle Pencil)
features: 🚀【64PCS Pencil Eraser Set】The set includes 32 hole-shaped triangle pencils + 32 cute erasers, including transparent and animal shapes, subverting traditional stationery and bringing more creativity and fun to children.

🍇【Children's Pencil Eraser】10 cartoon eraser styles: fruits, rabbits, sharks, astronauts, etc. Each shape is full of childlike interest and satisfies children's yearning for cute stationery. It is very suitable for children's stationery or as a gift.

🖍【Comfortable Triangular Pencil】Hole triangle pencil, comfortable to hold, anti-slip design, lightweight. Suitable for all ages, especially children. Use environmentally friendly resin materials to reduce the impact on the environment.

🎁【Multiple scene applications】Suitable for theme party gifts, birthday gifts, children's parties, giveaways, special gifts for Easter, Halloween, Easter... and other occasions. It is also an ideal choice for gift giving among family and friends.

🌈【Fun Prizes for Students】32 hole pencils + 32 fun erasers can be used as class gifts, school rewards, school supplies, student prizes, novel and cute erasers, and can also be used as small rewards to encourage students.
description: Product Description Runxin 64 PCS Fun Pencils with Eraser Set Includes 32 hole-punched triangular pencils + 32 adorable erasers with transparent and animal shapes, revolutionizing traditional stationery for creative and joyful experiences. Children's Pencil Erasers 10 cartoon styles: fruits, rabbits, sharks, astronauts, etc. Each design radiates childlike charm, perfect for children's stationery or as charming gifts. Versatile Applications Ideal for themed party gifts, birthdays, children's parties, giveaways, Easter, Halloween, and more. A perfect choice for gifting among friends and family. Interesting eraser size approximately: 2.2*2*1.4cm
